title: Voyage to the Prehistoric Planet
writer: Curtis Harrington, Aleksandr Kazantsev, Pavel Klushantsev
actors: Basil Rathbone, Faith Domergue, Marc Shannon
plot: In 2020, after the colonization of the moon, the spaceships Vega, Sirius and Capella are launched from Lunar Station 7. They are to explore Venus under the command of Professor Hartman, but an asteroid collides and explodes Capella.
